mapper.sql: EXC_ID, EXC_REQU_PARAM, EXC_NAME, EXC_MESSAGE, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from tbl_user_error_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_user_error_log (EXC_ID, EXC_REQU_PARAM, EXC_NAME, EXC_MESSAGE, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG) values (#{excId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into tbl_user_error_log
EXC_ID,
EXC_REQU_PARAM,
EXC_NAME,
EXC_MESSAGE,
OPER_USER_ID,
OPER_USER_NAME,
OPER_METHOD,
OPER_URI,
OPER_IP,
OPER_CREATE_TIME,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
ORG,
#{excId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update tbl_user_error_log
EXC_ID = #{record.excId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{record.excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_NAME = #{record.excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_MESSAGE = #{record.excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_ID = #{record.operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_NAME = #{record.operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_METHOD = #{record.operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_URI = #{record.operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_IP = #{record.operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{record.operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tbl_user_error_log set EXC_ID = #{record.excId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{record.excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_NAME = #{record.excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_MESSAGE = #{record.excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_ID = #{record.operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_NAME = #{record.operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_METHOD = #{record.operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_URI = #{record.operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_IP = #{record.operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{record.operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_user_error_log
EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_NAME = #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_MESSAGE = #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where EXC_ID = #{excId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tbl_user_error_log set EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_NAME = #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_MESSAGE = #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where EXC_ID = #{excId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

EXC_NAME = #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where EXC_ID = #{excId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
